---
name: Arc frame
about: One issue per arc — owned by the PM, read by engineers before session 1
title: "arc: <name>"
labels: ["arc"]
---

## Arc goal
What does done look like for this arc? (One paragraph.)

## Why now
What changed that makes this the right arc to run now?

## Candidate sessions (in order)
- [ ] Session 1: <goal>
- [ ] Session 2: <goal>
- [ ] Session 3: <goal>
- [ ] ...

## Exit criteria
The arc is done when:
- ...
- ...

## Out of scope
What is *explicitly* not in this arc, even if it feels related?

## Risk / unknowns
What could turn this arc into something larger? What would force a re-frame?

## Stakeholder reviews
- Office hours review at: <date>
- Arc retro at: <date>

---

> An arc that cannot be framed in this template is not ready to start.
> Send it back for sharper framing rather than starting and drifting.
